Converting 18.92:
18.92 * 0.999:
18.92 * 0.009 = 0.17028
18.92 * 0.090 = 1.70280
18.92 * 0.900 = 17.02800
0.17028 + 1.70280 = 1.87308
1.87308 + 17.02800 = 18.90108
= 18.901

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
